languages.text: "В последнем пустотном бою, Лорд-капитан. Он едва выжил после ранения, пережил пару попыток лечения от шарлатанов с нижней палубы и долгую дорогу до этого места. Однако никакое оружие не может уничтожить преданность и стойкость истинного слуги Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: {n}Человек в перчатках качает головой.{/n} "В последнем пустотном бою, Лорд-капитан. Его череп был расплавлен мельта-зарядом, но никакое оружие не может уничтожить храбое сердце истинного имперца".

languages.text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."
languages.original_text: "В последнем пустотном бою, Лорд-капитан. Он едва выжил после ранения, пережил пару попыток лечения от шарлатанов с нижней палубы и долгую дорогу до этого места. Однако никакое оружие не может уничтожить преданность и стойкость истинного слуги Бога-Императора".

traits.locale_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."
"In the last void battle, Lord Captain. He barely survived his injuries, but no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."
"In the last void battle, Lord Captain. He barely survived his injuries, but no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

languages.text: 「最後の虚無の戦いで、大隊長。彼は負傷を barely 生き延びたが、真の皇帝のしもべの献身と強靭さは、どんな武器でも破壊できない」
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain. He barely survived his injuries, but no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: 「最後の虚無の戦いで、大隊長。彼は負傷を barely 生き延びたが、真の皇帝のしもべの献身と強靭さは、どんな武器でも破壊できない。」

languages.text: « Lors de la dernière bataille spatiale, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, durant laquelle il a survécu de justesse à ses blessures. Divers charlatans des ponts inférieurs lui ont infligé des soins aussi douloureux qu’inefficaces, et la route qui l’a mené jusqu’ici a été particulièrement difficile. Cependant, aucune arme ne peut détruire la dévotion et la force d'âme d'un véritable serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu. »
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: « Lors de la dernière bataille spatiale, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}, durant laquelle il a survécu de justesse à ses blessures. Divers charlatans des ponts inférieurs lui ont infligé des soins aussi douloureux qu’inefficaces, et la route qui l’a mené jusqu’ici a été particulièrement difficile. Cependant, aucune arme ne peut détruire la dévotion et la force d'âme d'un véritable serviteur de l'Empereur-Dieu. »

languages.text: "Son uçsuz çatışmasında Lord Kaptan. Yaralarıyla zar zor hayatta kaldı. Alt güvertelerdeki şarlatanların birkaç iyileştirme denemesine maruz kaldı ve buraya gelmek için uzun bir yola katlandı. Ancak hiçbir silah, Tanrı İmparator'un gerçek bir kulunun sadakatini ve metanetini yok edemez."
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "Son uçsuz çatışmasında Lord Kaptan. Yaralarıyla zar zor hayatta kaldı. Alt güvertelerdeki şarlatanların birkaç iyileştirme denemesine maruz kaldı ve buraya gelmek için uzun bir yola katlandı. Ancak hiçbir silah, Tanrı İmparator'un gerçek bir kulunun sadakatini ve metanetini yok edemez."

languages.text: "In der letzten Raumschlacht, Lord Captain, als er seine Verletzungen nur mit Mühe überlebte. Er hat einige Heilungsversuche von Scharlatanen auf den unteren Decks erduldet und viel auf sich genommen, um hierher zu gelangen. Allerdings kann keine Waffe die Hingabe und Tapferkeit eines wahren Dieners des Gottimperators zerstören."
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: "In der letzten Raumschlacht, Lord Captain, als er seine Verletzungen nur mit Mühe überlebte. Er hat einige Heilungsversuche von Scharlatanen auf den unteren Decks erduldet und viel auf sich genommen, um hierher zu gelangen. Allerdings kann keine Waffe die Hingabe und Tapferkeit eines wahren Dieners des Gottimperators zerstören."

languages.text: «Durante nuestra última batalla en el vacío, Lord Capitán. Casi murió a causa de sus heridas, y luego tuvo que resistir los intentos de tratamiento de los charlatanes de las cubiertas inferiores y llegar hasta aquí, pero ningún arma puede destruir la devoción y fortaleza de un verdadero sirviente del Dios Emperador».
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."

traits.locale_text: «Durante nuestra última batalla en el vacío, Lord Capitán. Casi murió a causa de sus heridas, y luego tuvo que resistir los intentos de tratamiento de los charlatanes de las cubiertas inferiores y llegar hasta aquí, pero ningún arma puede destruir la devoción y fortaleza de un verdadero sirviente del Dios Emperador».

languages.text: “舰长大人，他是在一场战斗中负伤的，险些因重伤丧命。他接受过几次下层甲板江湖郎中的治疗，历尽漫长艰辛才来到这里。然而，任何武器都无法摧毁一名真正的神皇之仆的奉献与坚韧。”
languages.original_text: "In the last void battle, Lord Captain, where he barely survived his injuries. He has suffered a few healing attempts from charlatans on the lower decks and endured a long road to come here. However, no weapon can destroy the devotion and fortitude of a true servant of the God-Emperor."
